description: Yeast vacuolar protein sorting (VPS) in *Saccharomyces cerevisiae* is a critical pathway for delivering newly synthesized proteins, such as hydrolases and membrane proteins, to the vacuole – the fungal equivalent of lysosomes. This process ensures proper cellular degradation, nutrient recycling, and storage. The pathway begins with protein synthesis and folding in the Endoplasmic Reticulum (ER). Correctly folded proteins are then transported via COPII vesicles to the Golgi apparatus, which serves as the primary sorting hub.

graph TD
    A["Start: Gene Transcription"] --> B[mRNA Translation at ER]
    B --> C[Protein Folding & Glycosylation]
    C --> D[ER Chaperones (e.g., BiP)]
    D --> E{Protein Properly Folded?}
    E -->|No| F[Misfolded Protein]
    F --> G[ERAD Pathway Activation]
    G --> H[Ubiquitination & Retrotranslocation]
    H --> I[/Proteasomal Degradation/]
    E -->|Yes| J[Properly Folded Protein in ER Lumen]
    J --> K[COPII Vesicle Budding]
    K --> L[COPII Vesicle Transport to Golgi]
    L --> M[Fusion with Cis-Golgi]
    M --> N[Protein in Golgi]

    N --> O{Golgi Sorting Decision?}
    O -->|Secretory Pathway (Default)| P[Secretory Vesicle Transport]
    P --> Q[Protein Secretion/PM Insertion]

    O -->|Misfolded Transmembrane Protein| R[Dsc Ligase Pathway]
    R --> S[Dsc Ubiquitin Ligase Complex]
    S --> T[TM Degron Recognition & Ubiquitination]
    T --> U[Ubiquitinated Misfolded Protein]
    U --> V<Degradation Targeting AND>
    V --> W[Targeting to Vacuole via MVB]
    W --> X[/Vacuolar Degradation/]
    V --> Y[Targeting to Proteasome via ERAD/Cytosol]
    Y --> I

    O -->|Soluble Vacuolar Hydrolase (CPY)| Z[CPY Pathway]
    Z --> AA[Vps10 Receptor Binding]
    AA --> AB[Vps10 Receptor]
    AA --> AC[CPY-Vps10 Complex]
    AC --> AD[Clathrin Coat Assembly & Budding]
    AD --> AE[Clathrin & Adaptors]
    AD --> AF[CPY-Vps10 Clathrin Vesicle]
    AF --> AG[Transport to Prevacuolar Compartment (PVC)]
    AG --> AH[Vesicle Uncoating & Fusion with PVC]
    AH --> AI[PVC Acidification & CPY Release]
    AI --> AJ[Free CPY in PVC Lumen]
    AI --> AK[Vps10 Recycling to Golgi]
    AJ --> AL[Vacuolar Vesicle Formation from PVC]
    AL --> AM[Fusion with Vacuole]
    AM --> AN[Mature CPY in Vacuole Lumen]

    O -->|Transmembrane Vacuolar Protein (ALP)| AO[ALP Pathway]
    AO --> AP[Cytosolic Sorting Signal Recognition]
    AP --> AQ{Ubiquitination Required for MVB Entry?}
    AQ -->|Yes| AR[Ubiquitin Ligase (Rsp5)]
    AR --> AS[ALP Ubiquitination]
    AS --> AT[Ubiquitinated ALP]
    AQ -->|No/Already Ubiquitinated| AT
    AT --> AU[ESCRT Complexes (0, I, II, III)]
    AU --> AV[MVB Pathway Invagination & Budding]
    AV --> AW[ALP in MVB Intraluminal Vesicle]
    AW --> AX[MVB Transport & Maturation]
    AX --> AY[MVB Fusion with Vacuole]
    AY --> AZ[Mature ALP in Vacuolar Membrane]

    X --> BA[Vacuolar Proteases]
    AN --> BA
    AZ --> BA
    BA --> BB[/Degraded Products for Recycling/]
    X --> BC[Vacuolar Storage/Homeostasis]
    AN --> BC
    AZ --> BC
